query: INSERT INTO courses (code, title, description, colorTheme, totalLessons, cpdHours, displayOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('WOR101', 'Biblical Worship', 'This transformative course explores the biblical foundations and theology of Christian worship, equipping students to lead worship that honors God and transforms hearts. Students will examine worship throughout Scripture, study the theology of praise, explore various worship expressions and styles, and learn principles for creating authentic worship experiences. The curriculum addresses contemporary worship challenges including cultural sensitivity, theological depth, musical excellence, and spiritual authenticity. Through theological reflection, practical leadership skills, and case studies, students will develop a comprehensive understanding of worship as central to Christian discipleship and community formation, preparing them to lead congregations in meaningful, Spirit-empowered worship that glorifies God and builds up the body of Christ.', 'from-purple-600 to-pink-600', 10, 30, 17, NOW(), NOW())

Students will examine worship throughout Scripture, study the theology of praise, explore various worship expressions and styles, and learn principles for creating authentic worship experiences. The curriculum addresses contemporary worship challenges including cultural sensitivity, theological depth, musical excellence, and spiritual authenticity. Through theological reflection, practical leadership skills, and case studies, students will develop a comprehensive understanding of worship as central to Christian discipleship and community formation, preparing them to lead congregations in meaningful, Spirit-empowered worship that glorifies God and builds up the body of Christ.', 'from-purple-600 to-pink-600', 10, 30, 17, NOW(), NOW())
